name: Zipcar, Inc.
description: Zipcar, Inc. is the world’s leading car-sharing service, providing a convenient alternative to traditional car rental and ownership. Headquartered in Boston, Massachusetts, the company offers members on-demand access to vehicles parked in neighborhoods, cities, and university campuses across North America and Europe. By allowing users to book cars by the hour or day through a mobile app, Zipcar simplifies urban transportation. The service includes gas, insurance, and maintenance in its membership, aiming to provide a cost-effective, self-service mobility solution for individuals and businesses looking to reduce the burdens of personal vehicle ownership.
